description: CBOE P/C ratio extreme sentiment. 5d-EMA z-score vs 252d + persistence. BEARISH_EXTREME (panic z>=+2.5, LONG SPY/QQQ) or BULLISH_EXTREME (greed z<=-2.5, SHORT). FRED+Yahoo fallback. Garcia 2013, Pan-Poteshman 2006. ~62%/+4-7%/5-15d. Daily 21:15 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: CBOE put-call extreme sentiment detector daily 21:15 UTC
